app.title: Wavvon
onboarding.display_name.title: What should we call you?
onboarding.display_name.hint: Set a display name so others know who you are. You can change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.profile.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.profile.hint: Pick a nickname and an avatar so others recognize you. They're applied when you join a hub, and you can change them anytime in Settings.
identity_setup.passkey.unsupported: This browser or device doesn't support passkey-derived identities yet. Use a recovery phrase instead.
identity_setup.passkey.backup_title: Save a backup for your passkey identity
identity_setup.passkey.backup_hint: Your identity is now tied to this passkey — sign in with it on any device where your passkey provider (Bitwarden, 1Password, iCloud, Google) is signed in. The 24 words below are a universal backup that works even without the passkey.
identity_setup.label.title: Name this account
identity_setup.label.hint: Give this account a short label so you can tell it apart from others on this device.
identity_setup.add.title: Add another account
identity_setup.add.hint: Create a new identity or bring in one you already have. It's added alongside your other accounts on this device — nothing here is replaced.
identity_setup.choose.hint: Create a new identity or recover an existing one.
identity_setup.generated.title: Save your recovery phrase
identity_setup.generated.hint: Write these 24 words down and store them somewhere safe. Anyone with this phrase can control your identity.
identity_setup.recover.title: Recover identity
identity_setup.pair.title: Pair with an existing device
identity_setup.pair.hint: On a device you're already signed in on, open Settings → Account → Devices → “Pair a new device”, then paste the code it shows here.
identity_setup.pair.code_placeholder: Paste the code from your other device
identity_setup.pair.waiting_hint: Approve this device on your other device to finish.
identity_setup.pair.error_invalid_code: That pairing code isn't valid. Copy it again from your other device.
identity_setup.pair.error_expired_unappr: The pairing offer expired before it was approved.
welcome.tagline: Decentralized voice chat. Your identity, every hub.
welcome.hubs_desc: are independently-run servers — pick any one to join, or run your own. The same you works on every hub.
welcome.identity_desc: is a keypair stored on this device, not an account on a service. Nobody can deplatform you.
welcome.alliances_desc: let hubs share channels with each other so communities stay connected without merging.
hub.invite_only_hint: Invite-only — paste the full invite link to join
hub.add_modal.title: Add Hub
hub.add_modal.intro: Paste a hub address or a wavvon:// invite link.
hub.permalink.channel_not_found: That channel no longer exists or isn't visible to you
channel.unread.aria: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}
channel.empty.tip_voice: Click Join Voice in the header to start a voice session here — or double-click any channel in the sidebar.
channel.empty.tip_drag: Drag a file into the message area to share it (up to 3 MB).
channel.empty.tip_mentions: Type @name to mention someone, /me for an action, or paste a code block with ```.
channel.empty.tip_jump: Press <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>K</kbd> to jump to another channel from anywhere.
channel.create.banner_hint: Shown as a full-width image in the channel list. PNG, JPEG, GIF or WebP, max 512 KB for uploads.
channel.create.banner_bad_type: Only PNG, JPEG, GIF or WebP images are supported.
channel.create.banner_too_large: Image is too large — banners are capped at 512 KB.
channel.create.description_placeholder: Channel description (optional) — shown in the channel header
channel.create.spawner_template_hint: {ph} becomes the joiner's name. Defaults to {def} when left blank.
channel.spawner.tooltip: Click to create your own voice room
channel.no_selection: Select a channel to start chatting
voice.joined.aria: Joined voice in {channel} with {count, plural, one {# participant} other {# participants}}
voice.move.prompt.title: Move to another channel?
voice.move.prompt.body: An organizer wants to move you to {channel}.
settings.title: Settings
settings.language.label: Language
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.theme.hint: How Wavvon looks. Pick whichever feels right — you can change it any time.
settings.theme.custom.empty: No saved themes yet — click + New to create one.
settings.profile.display_name.hint: Shown to other members in hubs you join.
settings.profile.avatar_url.label: Avatar URL
settings.profile.avatar_url.hint: Link to an image to use as your avatar.
settings.profile.context.label: Profile to edit
settings.profile.subtitle: Your name, avatar, and bio — set a default for new hubs, or tailor how you appear on each one.
settings.profile.hubs.show_toggle: Show my hubs on my profile
settings.profile.hubs.hidden_note: Your hubs are hidden. Turn this on to feature your favorites on your profile.
settings.profile.hubs.empty: No hubs added yet — pick from the ones you have joined.
settings.profile.fields.activities_place: What are you up to? Games you're playing, sessions you're planning, what you'd like to do…
settings.profile.context.no_session: Not connected to this hub right now — open it from the sidebar once, then edit your profile here.
settings.profile.context.following: Following the default profile — it updates whenever the default is saved. Editing any field here detaches it.
settings.profile.save_name_required: Every edited profile needs a display name before saving.
settings.profile.default.hint: The name and avatar this account starts with when it joins a hub. Each hub keeps its own copy you can change any time.
settings.profile.current_hub.hint: How you appear on {hub}. Stored by the hub itself — other hubs are not affected.
settings.profile.current_hub.active_only: You can only edit per-hub profiles for the account you're signed in with. Switch to this account to change how it appears on its hubs.
settings.notifications.mention.label: Mention sound
settings.notifications.mention.hint: Play a sound when your name is mentioned.
settings.notifications.desktop.label: Desktop notifications
settings.notifications.desktop.hint: Allow the browser to show notifications for new messages.
settings.notifications.per_hub.label: Per-hub notification level
settings.notifications.per_hub.hint: Control which messages trigger browser notifications for each hub.
settings.account.pubkey.label: Your public key
settings.account.pubkey.hint: Your unique identity. Share this with someone to send you a friend request. Same key works on every hub.
settings.account.identity_backup.label: Identity backup
settings.account.identity_backup.hint: Export your identity to an encrypted file. Anyone with the file and passphrase can become you — store it safely and never share the passphrase.
settings.account.identity_backup.import_: Import complete: {added} added, {alreadyPresent} already on this device.
settings.account.identity_backup.export_: Create a passphrase-protected backup of your identity. This file plus your passphrase restores your identity on any device.
settings.account.identity_backup.weak_wa: Weak passphrase — a strong passphrase is your primary defense if this file is stolen.
settings.account.identity_backup.error_s: Select at least one account to export.
settings.account.identity_backup.error_d: Couldn't unlock — wrong passphrase or the file is damaged.
settings.account.identity_backup.import_: If you still have a working device, pair it instead of importing a backup. Import only when recovering from total device loss.
settings.account.identity_backup.error_m: Select a file and enter the passphrase.
settings.account.identity_backup.import_:
{count, plural, one {Import added # new identity} other {Import added # new identities}}{alreadyPresent, plural, =0 {} other { (# already on this device)}}.

Switch to the first new identity now?

Make sure the current identity is backed up first.
settings.account.full_archive.label: Full archive
settings.account.full_archive.hint: Export everything Wavvon holds about you as one passphrase-encrypted file: identity, home hub list, decrypted DM history, custom theme, and drafts.
settings.account.full_archive.warning: This file contains your DM history in plain text once decrypted. Store it as carefully as your passphrase.
settings.account.full_archive.error_miss: Select a file and enter the passphrase.
settings.account.full_archive.restore_hi: Restores hub list, drafts, and custom themes into the archive's identity — creating it as a new account on this device if it isn't here yet. DM history isn't re-imported; a synced home hub re-delivers it live, and the archive itself stays readable if that hub is gone.
settings.account.full_archive.restore_co: Restored {restored} item(s); skipped {skipped} that already existed.
settings.account.full_archive.restore_sw:
Restored {restored} item(s); skipped {skipped} that already existed.

Switch to this account now?
settings.account.local_data.label: Local data
settings.account.local_data.hint: Wipes per-device preferences (unread, mutes, pins, voice settings, recents). Your identity and the list of saved hubs are kept — use Restore from recovery phrase or Leave hub for those.
settings.account.public_profile.label: Public hub profile
settings.account.public_profile.hint: Let people see which hubs you're on. Visible to anyone who views your profile.
settings.account.public_profile.join_fir: Join a hub first to configure your public profile.
settings.account.public_profile.select_h: Select an active hub to publish
settings.account.public_profile.switch_h: Switch to a hub to publish your profile
settings.account.accounts.label: Accounts on this device
settings.account.accounts.hint: Switch between Wavvon identities you've added to this device. Accounts are device-local — this list is never synced to any hub.
settings.account.accounts.pubkey_hint: Each account's public key is its unique identity — share it so people can send a friend request. The same key works on every hub.
settings.account.accounts.switch_blocked: Leave the voice channel to switch account
settings.account.accounts.switch_cooldow: Please wait a moment before switching accounts again.
settings.account.accounts.key_click_to_c: Click to copy the full key
settings.account.accounts.reorder_hint: Drag to reorder. Focus and use the up/down arrow keys to move without a mouse.
settings.account.accounts.active_hint: This is the active account on this device.
settings.account.accounts.remove_confirm: Without its recovery phrase, passkey, or a backup file, this identity can't be recovered once removed. Type its fingerprint below to confirm.
settings.account.certifications.label: Badges & certifications
settings.account.certifications.hint: Achievements and attestations communities have granted your identity. You carry them across hubs — hide any you don’t want shown.
settings.account.per_account_hint: This section is scoped to {label} — every account on this device keeps its own.
settings.account.managing.label: Managing
settings.account.managing.hint: Choose which account on this device the sections below act on — you don't have to switch to manage it.
settings.account.not_member_notice: {label} isn't a member of this hub.
settings.account.home_hubs.label: Home hubs
settings.account.home_hubs.hint: The ordered list of hubs where others can reach you. The first is your preferred hub. Publishing signs the list with your master key so any hub can verify it.
settings.account.home_hubs.per_account_h: These home hubs belong to {label} — every account on this device publishes its own separate list.
settings.account.home_hubs.paired_read_o: On this device, {label} uses a paired device key and can't change the home hub list — manage it from a device holding this account's recovery phrase.
settings.account.devices.label: Devices
settings.account.devices.hint: Link more devices to this identity. Each device keeps its own key; a shared master key ties them together so every device is recognised as you.
settings.account.devices.empty: No linked devices registered on this hub yet.
settings.account.devices.pair_code_hint: On your other device, choose “Pair with an existing device” and paste this code. It expires in 5 minutes.
settings.account.devices.claim_approve_s: ). Approve only if you started this.
settings.account.devices.error_expired: The pairing offer expired. Start again.
settings.account.passkeys.label: Passkeys
settings.account.passkeys.hint: Sign in with your device's biometrics or PIN instead of your recovery phrase. Passkeys are tied to a specific hub — register one while logged in.
settings.account.passkeys.no_active_hub: Connect to a hub to manage passkeys.
settings.account.passkeys.switch_to_add: Switch to {label} to add a passkey.
settings.account.trusted_devices.label: Trusted devices
settings.account.trusted_devices.hint: Devices that have been granted long-lived access to this hub. Revoke any device you no longer recognise.
settings.account.trusted_devices.no_acti: Connect to a hub to manage trusted devices.
settings.account.blocked_users.label: Blocked users ({count})
settings.account.blocked_users.hint: Blocked users cannot DM you. Their messages in shared channels are hidden (collapsed — click to reveal). Their audio is muted in voice.
settings.account.ignored_users.label: Ignored users ({count})
settings.account.ignored_users.hint: Ignored users' messages are collapsed in chat (click to reveal). They can still DM you and their @mentions still notify you.
settings.voice.speaker: Speaker
settings.voice.sensitivity.label: Mic sensitivity — threshold {value}
settings.voice.sensitivity.hint: Drag the marker. Voice is detected when the green bar crosses it. Fill animates only while you're in voice or running a mic test. Changes apply on the next voice channel you join.
settings.voice.mic_test.hint: Plays your mic back through your speaker. Use headphones to avoid feedback.
settings.voice.mode.label: Activation mode
settings.voice.mode.hint: Voice activity (VAD) opens the mic when it detects speech. Push-to-talk keeps it muted until you hold the bound key.
settings.voice.notify_sound.label: Notification sound
settings.voice.notify_sound.hint: Plays a short sound when you receive a notification — mentions, replies, or activity in channels you follow.
settings.voice.devices.permission_hint: Your browser hides device names until you grant microphone access once — click to reveal them.
settings.voice.devices.permission_grante: Microphone access granted — device names are now visible.
settings.voice.devices.output_empty: No output devices detected — grant permission or check your OS.
settings.camera.bg.pick_hint_image: Pick an image above (until then the background is blurred).
settings.camera.bg.pick_hint_video: Pick a video above (until then the background is blurred).
settings.camera.bg.status_unavailable: Background effects are not available in this browser — showing the plain camera.
settings.camera.permission_hint: Your browser hides camera names until you grant camera access once — click to reveal them.
settings.camera.permission_granted: Camera access granted — camera names are now visible.
settings.security.recovery.label: Recovery phrase
settings.security.recovery.hint: 24 words you can use to restore your identity. Write them down and keep them safe — anyone with these words can impersonate you.
settings.devices.home_hubs.title: Home Hubs
settings.devices.home_hubs.hint: These hubs store your device list, DMs, and preferences. DMs are delivered to each hub in order.
settings.devices.pairing.title: Device Pairing
settings.devices.pairing.hint: Link this device to your identity on another machine, or allow a new device to join using your existing identity.
settings.about.description: Wavvon — decentralized voice chat + community platform.
channel.sidebar.label: Channels
member.list.title: Members
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
farm.settings.title: Farm settings
farm.settings.general.name: Farm name
farm.settings.general.policy.label: Hub creation policy
farm.settings.general.directory.label: Directory
farm.settings.general.directory.public: Directory public (list public hubs at /farm/hubs without auth)
farm.settings.general.directory.discover: Allow discovery listing (publish to the Wavvon discovery network)
farm.settings.hubs.title: Hubs — {count}
farm.settings.hubs.col.name: Name
farm.settings.users.title: Users — {count}
farm.suspend_dialog.title: Suspend hub
farm.suspend_dialog.hint: Suspending {name} blocks all traffic through the farm proxy. The hub process stays running.
farm.delete_dialog.title: Delete hub
farm.delete_dialog.hint: Deleting {name} removes it from the farm directory permanently. The hub database is left intact for the operator.
hub.admin.title: Hub settings
hub.admin.soundboard.title: Soundboard
hub.admin.soundboard.hint: Short Opus-in-Ogg clips (up to 10s, 512KB) members can trigger in voice — up to 50 per hub.
hub.admin.soundboard.col.name: Name
hub.admin.overview.title: Overview
hub.admin.overview.name: Hub name
hub.admin.overview.description_hint: Shown to visitors before they join.
hub.admin.overview.icon_hint: PNG or JPG, max 256 KB. Stored inline on the hub.
hub.admin.overview.require_approval: Require admin approval before new members can participate
hub.admin.overview.require_approval_hint: When on, anyone who authenticates is marked pending. They can see their own status but nothing else until an admin approves them on the Members tab.
hub.admin.overview.antispam_hint: Connecting clients must prove CPU work tied to their public key. Higher levels take longer to compute and slow down bot floods. messages per minute (0 = disabled)
hub.admin.overview.max_depth_hint: Limits how deep categories and channels can nest. 0 = unlimited. If set to 4, categories can nest up to depth 3 and channels up to depth 4.
hub.admin.overview.welcome_hint: Shown to joiners: “This is a server by {label} — join our hub: {invite}”
hub.admin.discovery.title: Discovery
hub.admin.discovery.share.label: Share this hub
hub.admin.discovery.directory.label: Submit to directory
hub.admin.discovery.directory.hint: List this hub on the Wavvon discovery directory so others can find it. Your hub signs the submission — no account needed.
hub.admin.discovery.directory.bio_placeh: Tell people what your hub is about…
hub.admin.roles.title: Roles
hub.admin.roles.hint: Built-in roles (everyone, Owner) can't be renamed or deleted, but the everyone role's permissions can be tuned.
hub.admin.role_categories.title: Categories
hub.admin.role_categories.hint: Categories group roles for display only — they carry no permissions of their own.
hub.admin.role_categories.category_empty: No roles in this category yet.
hub.admin.role_categories.delete_confirm: Delete this category? Its roles will become uncategorized.
hub.admin.members.pending.title: Pending approval — {count}
hub.admin.members.title: Members — {count}
hub.admin.members.col.name: Name
hub.admin.bans.title: Bans — {count}
hub.admin.icons.title: Icon Library
hub.admin.icons.hint: Upload custom SVG icons that any member can apply to channels and categories from the appearance editor.
discover.title: Discover hubs
discover.empty: No hubs found. Try a different search or check back later.
discover.empty.hint: Hub owners can list their hub from Hub Settings → Overview → Submit to directory.
invites.title: Invites — {count}
invites.create.title: Create invite
invites.create.admin_grant_hint: Invites that grant an admin-level role are forced to a single use and expire within 24 hours.
invites.default_role.title: Default role for new members
invites.default_role.hint: Members who join through an invite with no explicit role get this role automatically. Without it, newcomers only have the everyone role.
friends.title: Friends
friends.add.label: Add friend
friends.add.hub_placeholder: Hub URL (optional — leave blank if friend is on this hub)
friends.add.hint: Same-hub friends require the other person to accept your request. Cross-hub friends (with a Hub URL) are added immediately as a one-sided address book entry.
friends.pending.label: Pending requests ({count})
friends.list.label: Friends ({count})
dm.header.title: Direct Messages
dm.no_conversations: No direct messages yet. Click a member in the user list to start a conversation.
dm.group_banner: Group DMs are not end-to-end encrypted. The hub operator can read these messages.
dm.group_banner_detail: Only use group DMs with people you trust on this hub.
content.search.title: Search messages
alliances.title: Alliances
alliances.hint: Group your hub with other hubs to share channels and voice. A hub can be in multiple alliances.
alliances.new.title: New alliance
alliances.channels.hint: Toggle which of your local channels are visible to other members of this alliance.
alliances.no_selection: Select an alliance from the list to see its details, or create a new one with the + button.
alliances.invite.push.label: Send invite directly
alliances.invite.push.hint: Enter another hub's URL to send them an alliance invite. Their admin will see it in Hub Settings → Alliance invites.
alliances.invite.push.message_placeholde: Optional message to the other hub's admin…
alliances.invite.code.label: Invite another hub
alliances.invite.code.hint: Generate a share code and send it to the other hub's admin.
alliances.invite.code.share_hint: Share this code with the other hub's admin:
alliances.join.label: Join via share code
alliances.join.hint: Paste the share code you received from another hub's admin.
alliances.share.category_hint: Sharing a category shares its whole subtree with the alliance — including sub-channels added later.
ext_bot.section.title: External Bots
ext_bot.section.hint: Add a bot operated externally. Generate an invite token and share it with the bot operator.
ext_bot.pubkey.label: Bot public key (hex)
ext_bot.note.label: Local note (optional)
ext_bot.token.warning: Share this token with the bot operator. It expires in 24 hours.
ext_bot.col.name: Name / note
webhooks.title: Integrations
webhooks.hint: Webhooks let external services post messages into a channel using a simple HTTP POST.
webhooks.channel.label: Channel
webhooks.name.label: Display name
webhooks.avatar.label: Avatar URL (optional)
webhooks.secret_warning: This URL contains a secret. Save it now — it won't be shown again.
webhooks.regen_warning: New webhook URL — save it now.
webhooks.col.name: Name
profile.title: Profile
profile.hint: Create as many profiles as you like — say, one for friends and one for work. The one marked Default is what new hubs use automatically.
profile.label: Profile label
profile.delete_hint: You need at least one profile
profile.per_hub.label: Profile per hub
profile.per_hub.hint: Choose which profile to use on each hub. Changing the active hub's assignment applies it immediately.
profile.empty: No profiles yet — click + New above to create one.
avatar_picker.hint: Pick a generated avatar, or shuffle for more.
create_hub.title: Create a hub
create_hub.intro: A client can't spawn a server. Pick a way to stand one up, then come back here with your owner invite.
create_hub.web.label: Set it up on the web
create_hub.web.hint: Pick a template, customise it, and get a ready-to-run deploy command.
create_hub.cli.label: Run it yourself
create_hub.cli.hint: On your own machine, this interactive command asks for a name, domain, and TLS setup, then starts your hub and prints your owner invite.
create_hub.invite.label: Already created it? Paste your owner invite
create_hub.invite.hint: The first-boot owner invite from your new hub drops you in already owning it.
create_hub.choose.title: Create a hub
create_hub.choose.hint: How do you want to create your hub?
hub_wizard.step1.title: Create a hub — pick a farm
hub_wizard.step1.hint: Choose a farm to host your new hub. Farms are ranked by connection speed.
hub_wizard.step1.no_farms: No farms found in your list.
hub_wizard.step2.title: Create a hub on {farm}
hub_wizard.step3.title: Your hub is ready!
hub_wizard.validate.name_too_long: Name must be 64 characters or fewer
hub_wizard.validate.name_chars: Name may only contain letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens
user.ctx.ignored_feedback: Ignored — their messages will be collapsed.
user.ctx.blocked_feedback: Blocked — their messages and mentions will be hidden.
message.ignored_placeholder: Message from ignored user — click to reveal
challenge.prompt: Confirm you're not a bot to continue.
lobby.title: You're in the lobby
lobby.auto_promote: You'll be let in automatically once verification finishes.
lobby.pending_approval: Your answers are with the admins. You'll get access once they approve.
lobby.sidebar_hint: Verifying your device — full access soon
bot.wizard.token_warning: This token is only shown once. Copy it now — you won't be able to retrieve it later.
channel.appearance.title: Edit appearance
channel.permissions.hint: Set per-role overwrites for this channel. Anything left on Inherit falls back to the role's permissions from parent categories, then the hub-wide role.
channel.permissions.locked_rank: This role is at or above your own rank, so its overwrites are read-only here. Roles with the admin permission bypass channel overwrites anyway.
hub.admin.recovery.explainer: When a member loses their key entirely, the recovery contacts they designated can vouch that a new key belongs to them. Once enough contacts attest, the request lands in the queue below — nothing transfers automatically, and it's up to you to approve, partially approve, or reject it.
events.reminder.label: Reminder
events.slots.title: Slots
events.staging.title: Staging: {event}
events.staging.squad_rooms.title: Spawn squad rooms
settings.profile.hubs.viewer_empty: This member doesn't show their hubs.
